title: USCIS updates policy on applying discretion in adjudications
description_html: USCIS issues policy guidance in the USCIS Policy Manual regarding the discretionary analysis required in the adjudication of certain benefit requests, including certain applications for employment authorization. [ID #1142]
description_text: USCIS issues policy guidance in the USCIS Policy Manual regarding the discretionary analysis required in the adjudication of certain benefit requests, including certain applications for employment authorization. [ID #1142]
